evidence: Local HTTP verification proved health 200, unauthenticated status 401, and authenticated owner status on 2026-07-11.
Owner directed AG OS to be made live for owner use after PR #128 merged the coordinator runtime.
GitHub main merge commit 81866ec6b4e127db254ba0ba15bfc9ee7cf7f9dd is the first known-good coordinator source recovery point.
tests/state-backup.test.mjs performs an isolated hashed backup, mutation, restore, and integrity verification without touching live data.
Passive health monitor and systemd timer templates exist, but no live monitoring call or timer is active before deployment approval.
Rotation and revocation procedure is documented, but no production owner token or reverse-proxy password may be created or changed without exact approval.
Deployment plan adds no approved paid service; existing Hetzner capacity must be confirmed before activation and any added charge remains blocked.
Local gates must pass and GitHub CI must succeed for the exact deployment-prep candidate commit before production approval.
No exact Hetzner target, source SHA, credential setup, reverse-proxy activation, monitoring activation, or production deployment approval is active.

recoveryTargets.rationale: Owner commands and evidence records must be snapshotted before change; a source and state rollback should restore the internal command center within one hour without accepted record loss.

emergencyStop: Disable ag-os-monitor.timer, stop ag-os.service, preserve logs and the current state directory, revoke the owner API token and dashboard password under exact approval, and restore the last verified source commit plus state snapshot before restarting.
